--- "Pecker, David" dpecker@amilink.com wrote:

FYI, as you recall, this is the Creative Director at
AMI.

From: Boulton, Neal
Sent: Tuesday, November 29, 2005 11:54 AM
To: Pecker, David
Subject: RE: Please advise

David,

Good news on this: We plan to shoot her end of
next week for a four
page "Get the Girl" feature that will appear in
the April Issue. She
flys back today I believe, when we will discuss
exact dates.

She is excited, after I called her myself and
discussed.

Note: All the guys down here are excited about her
as a model for this
story.
